company.description:
# Bland Garvey CPA | Richardson, TX – Bland Garvey CPA

## Strategic Accounting, Tax, and Wealth Management **for You and Your Business**

##### At Bland Garvey, we come alongside to advise you in making financial decisions to grow, live, and retire well.

### Proactive

Accounting & Tax  
Planning

### Real-Time

Business Financial  
Consulting

### Personalized

Wealth  
Management

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/image-home-408-edited1-1024x846.jpg)

## There are so many details to consider in your personal and business finances.

##### We know how complex and confusing it can be to make financial decisions on your own.

*   Are you too busy to get a good handle on your financials?
*   Do you have the information you need to make informed decisions for your personal and business finances?
*   Do you notice a disconnect between the advice you get for retirement investments and your annual tax planning?

#### Going it alone in your money decisions can mean missing out on key opportunities.

## Proactive, personalized guidance to help you make financial decisions with confidence.

##### You deserve to have the guidance from friendly financial professionals who understand all your financial needs – past, present, and future. 

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image-home-377-1024x683.jpg)

Bland Garvey is a team of financial professionals who provide accounting, tax, and wealth management services to enable individuals and businesses to make better decisions about money. We understand how stressful it can be to navigate financial decisions when that’s not your profession. 

For 50+ years the Bland Garvey PC team has been giving clients like you clear guidance, so you can make financial decisions with confidence in your business and personal life. We serve a wide variety of professionals, but we have honed our expertise working with: 

*   Physicians, Dentists & Healthcare Practices
*   Professional Service Businesses such as Architects, Engineers, Lawyers, and others. 

**Let us free you up to spend more time on the aspects of your life and business you enjoy, and less time on complex money matters.**

## A simpler way to stay on top of every detail.

We are **proactive** with your finances and stay up-to-date on the latest tax measures — so you don’t have to.

We have the **necessary conversations** – even if they are tough.

We help you build the **life you want** – using your finances as the tool to do it. 

## CPAs & Wealth Advisors, Serving North Texas & Beyond

Breathe a sigh of relief, knowing that you have trustworthy financial professionals   
for all your personal and business financial needs. 

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/FPAS_BadgeLogo_Color-1024x403.png)

Bland Garvey Wealth Advisors is an independent member of the Focus Partners Advisor Solutions Community

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/PG_Tagline_Standard_Member_2022-1024x122.png)

Bland Garvey PC is a member of **Prime**Global, an award-winning association of over 300 successful member firms from over 100 countries.

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/aicpa.jpg)

Bland Garvey PC is a member of the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA).

## We offer the full suite of services to help you live, grow, and retire well.

At Bland Garvey, we’re more than a CPA firm. We advise based on the past, present, and future. 

1 Services provided by Bland Garvey, PC  
2 Services provided by Bland Garvey Wealth Advisors, LLC

## Your Road Map to Financial Confidence

Getting started as a client is simple.

##### Schedule a Consult

We’ll listen to your needs and goals for the future so we have a clear understanding of what success means to you.

##### Receive a Customized Plan

Whether it’s taxes, business consulting, or long-term financial planning, we’ll give you a straightforward plan in alignment with your goals.

##### Be Ready for What’s Next

As your business and personal assets grow, we will be right there with you, proactively looking out for your financial needs.

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/2025_ARIZENT_AT_BEST-FIRMS-TO-WORK-FOR-1024x518.png)

## We are all about numbers –  
and all about people.

Our team is second to none. We can’t wait to introduce them to you.

Bland Garvey PC Named Top 100 Best Places to Work by Accounting Today

## Financial Confidence for Your Future

You deserve to have confidence today and for the future.

Going it alone in your money decisions can mean missing out on opportunities. At Bland Garvey, our tax, accounting, and wealth advisor teams provide the financial expertise you need to grow, live, and retire well.

Get advice with the entire picture in mind.

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image-home-955-1024x683.jpg)

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/icon-home-5tips.svg)

## 6 Tips to Safeguard Against Tough Times In Your Business

Life is unpredictable, and you never know what can come up in your business and personal life. However, you can take advantage of these 6 high-impact tips we share with our clients to safeguard their finances and be prepared to tackle uncertainty.

![](https://www.blandgarvey.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/Your-business-page-3-edited-641x1024.jpg)

# City of San Diego Official Website

## A Message From the Mayor

![Photo of Mayor Gloria](https://sandiego.gov/sites/default/files/mayor-gloria-circle.png)

San Diego is a special place with limitless potential, where everyone deserves equal access to opportunity, happiness, and a bright future. Our City is here to help foster those ideals in every neighborhood. It exists to serve you and be a resource for you, your family, and your community. Working together, we can create a San Diego that is responsive, transparent, and inclusive for all of us.

**Mayor Todd Gloria**

[Visit the Mayor's Site](https://sandiego.gov/mayor)
